app.name: Vite
app.one_liner: A next-generation frontend build tool that provides instant dev server start, lightning-fast HMR, and optimized production builds via Rollup.

screens.name: Dev Server Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display real-time status of the Vite development server including module graph, HMR updates, and error overlays.

rust_commands.name: build_production_bundle
rust_commands.purpose: Bundle the application using Rollup with pre-configured optimizations for production deployment.

rust_commands.name: start_dev_server
rust_commands.purpose: Initialize and run the Vite development server with native ES module support and HMR.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement native ES module dev server with basic HMR
week 1: Integrate Rollup-based production build pipeline
acceptance_tests: CJS interop assignments are correctly hoisted to avoid TDZ errors during module evaluation.
Fast Refresh works reliably in pnpm-managed React projects without $RefreshSig$ undefined errors.
HMR updates propagate to the browser in under 50ms without full page reload.
Production build outputs minified, tree-shaken static assets compatible with modern browsers.
The dev server starts within 200ms on a cold boot with a minimal React app.
